document.source_title: IPL 2026 | Super Kings cross swords with Sunrisers in a must-win encounter

claims.claim_text: Chennai Super Kings need to win the final two matches to keep playoff hopes alive.
claims.evidence_text: Having earned six victories, Super Kings need to win the final two matches and hope a few other results go their way to keep playoff hopes alive.

entities.name: Chennai Super Kings
entities.description: A five-time champion team in the IPL.
entities.evidence_text: Even as CSK looks to maximise its home advantage in a must-win encounter.

entities.name: Sunrisers Hyderabad
entities.description: A team competing against Chennai Super Kings in IPL 2026.
entities.evidence_text: Sunrisers Hyderabad's Aniket Verma, Ishan Kishan and Travis Head during a practice session.

events.event: IPL match between Chennai Super Kings and Sunrisers Hyderabad
events.evidence_text: When Chennai Super Kings set foot at the MAC Stadium for one last time this IPL season to take on Sunrisers Hyderabad in Chennai on Monday (May 18, 2026).

metrics.name: victories
metrics.evidence_text: Having earned six victories, Super Kings need to win the final two matches.

metrics.name: losses
metrics.evidence_text: The Super Kings comes into the fixture on the back of a crushing seven-wicket loss to Lucknow Super Giants.
